notices.notice_text:
Independent critique of “HELP! Conspiracy Theories Are Ruining My Marriage!” 37 Questions to Consider

I’ve published an evidence-focused critique of this CrossExamined episode. It recognizes the episode’s stronger points while examining several claims that may require additional evidence or argument.

Contents:
i. Thesis and overview
ii. Method
iii. Research base
iv. Claim map
v. 1. Conspiracy falsifiability and evidence resistance
vi. 2. Preliminary evidence, conviction language, and capital punishment
vii. 3. Demonic diagnosis of lies, slander, and social destruction
viii. 4. Biblical authority, self-authority, and public warrant
ix. 5. Repentance, guilt, and Holy Spirit assurance
x. Overall assessment
xi. Evidence needed
xii. AI prompt

Read the critique:
https://onreason.com/episodes/2026-07-14-help-conspiracy-theories-are-ruining-my-marriage-37-questions-to/

Substantive corrections, objections, and responses are welcome.
